seed_instruction: I am planning to start a book club with some friends. Can you write an email invitation for the same?
org_constraint: The email should consist of exactly three paragraphs.
new_constraint: The email must contain a minimum of 200 words, with each paragraph limited to a maximum of 60 words.
instruction: I am planning to start a book club with some friends. Can you write an email invitation for the same? The email should consist of exactly three paragraphs. The email must contain a minimum of 200 words, with each paragraph limited to a maximum of 60 words.
response:
Subject: 🎉 Let's Start a Book Club! 📚

Hi everyone, I'm so excited to propose an idea I think we'd all really enjoy: starting a book club! I've been wanting a dedicated time to dive into some great literature and discuss it with all of you. It would be a wonderful way to connect outside of our usual outings and expand our horizons together with some fascinating stories.

I envision us selecting a diverse range of books—fiction, non-fiction, maybe even some classics to keep things interesting! We can meet up at a friend's place or grab coffee somewhere cozy. What kind of genres are you all most interested in exploring initially? Let me know your thoughts on themes!

To get the ball rolling, I suggest we aim for a first meeting in the next few weeks. Please reply to this email with your availability and any initial book suggestions you have in mind. Can't wait to start this literary adventure with you all! 📖😊<turn|>
